understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through all KA59 levels by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time; a level is only won when all goals are simultaneously covered, and the full game is won after completing all levels within the per-level step budgets.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn controls the currently selected piece (identified by player.id and player.position in pixel coordinates where each grid cell is 3 pixels). MOVE_* attempts to shift the selected piece one cell in that direction; if a pushable object (e.g., a block) is immediately adjacent in the move direction and the space beyond allows, it can be pushed along with the move. Walls/boundaries can block movement, but the movement.{direction}_blocked flags are only hints about adjacent objects and do not guarantee success or failure. If multiple selectables exist, control can be switched using CLICK on another selectable's exact pixel position as listed in objects.selectables (same coordinate system as player.position).
